subject: DevOps
title: The Four Golden Signals
description: A 60-second lesson on The Four Golden Signals.

hook.text: Google monitors thousands of services. They distilled it to four signals that matter most.

buildup.text: Latency: how long requests take. Traffic: how many requests arrive. Two of the four.

discovery.text: Errors: how many requests fail. Saturation: how full is the system. The other two.

twist.text: If you instrument nothing else, instrument these four. They catch most problems.

climax.text: A latency spike plus rising saturation means you're running out of capacity. Act fast.

punchline.text: Latency, traffic, errors, saturation. Four signals, full view.

quiz.question: Which of the following is one of Google's four golden signals?
